defs: Partaking of the same nature; allied by natural characteristics; kindred; sympathetic.
quotes: Congenial souls! whose life one avarice joins.
two congenial spirits united . . . by mutual confidence and reciprocal virtues

defs: Naturally adapted; suited to the disposition; as, a congenial atmosphere to work in.
quotes: To defame the excellence with which it has no sympathy . . . is its congenial work.

defs: capable of cross-fertilization or of being grafted; -- used of plants.
